last_completed_round.direction_name: Keep the current best branch and raise the hot-band K16 loop to the next small unroll factor
last_completed_round.hypothesis: Round 27 confirmed that the lighter compiler approach to fixed-loop overhead works: restoring the best branch and moving away from `unroll 1` delivered a large gain without disturbing correctness. The next logical move is to stay on that axis and raise the K16 hot-band loop to the next small unroll factor. This keeps the same grouped-order base, the same `launch_bounds(128, 2)` clue, and the same control structure, while giving ptxas more room to schedule across adjacent iterations.

notes: Build passed for round 29/50. Node A will measure the result next.
